Our Story
Style is not what you wear.
It is how you are remembered.

Oars Signatures was born in New GRA, Port Harcourt — a fashion house built on the belief that luxury should be accessible, intentional and deeply personal. We curate pieces that do not follow trends. They set them.

Every item in our collection is selected with one question in mind: does this communicate identity before a single word is spoken? If the answer is yes, it earns its place.

The Process

How It Works

Order in under two minutes. No apps, no registration, no friction.

01
🛍️
Browse the Collection

Explore all 14 curated pieces across five categories. View full details, sizing and pricing on this website.

02
💬
Tap Order via Telegram

Every product has a direct Telegram button. Tap it and our bot opens pre-loaded with your selected item.

03
📋
Confirm Your Order

The bot collects your size, quantity and delivery address in under 60 seconds. No typing essays.

04
🚀
Pay & Receive

Complete payment and your order is dispatched. Nationwide delivery across all 36 states. Tracked and secured.
